# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy: {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy: {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: database
spec:
  port: 5432
  proxy: {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccount:
        name: frontend-svc-account
        namespace: frontend
    destinations:
    - port: 8080
      service:
        name: backend-server
        namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccount:
        name: backend-svc-account
        namespace: backend
    destinations:
    - port: 5432
      service:
        name: database-server
        namespace: database
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-port-8080
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccount:
        name: frontend-svc-account
        namespace: frontend
    destinations:
    - port: 8080
      service:
        name: backend-server
        namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database-port-5432
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccount:
        name: backend-svc-account
        namespace: backend
    destinations:
    - port: 5432
      service:
        name: database-server
        namespace: database
